_instructions: Keys are recipe slugs from Mealie URLs: /g/home/r/my-recipe-slug
All tags must exist in userdata/taxonomy.json.
All categories must exist in userdata/taxonomy.json.
Run step 1 (audit) to dump all slugs. Run step 3 (apply) to push changes.
freetext_skip_slugs: list of slugs to skip in step 6 (free-text ingredient parser).
Use this for recipes with section-prefixed ingredients like 'Dough — 180g flour'
that confuse the parser. Leave empty if not needed.
